address.heading: Shipping Address
address.saveInfo: Save this information for next time

payment.heading: Payment Method

card.label: Credit/Debit Card
card.description: Pay securely with your credit or debit card via Stripe
card.detail: Go to payment powered by Stripe

tabby.label: Pay in 4 interest-free installments
tabby.description: Split your purchase into 4 easy monthly payments of ${{amount}}
tabby.detail: No interest, No fees. Available for orders from $20–$4000. Pay ${{amount}} today, rest over 3 months.

tamara.label: Split in 3 or Pay Next Month
tamara.description: Split into 3 payments of ${{amount}} or pay the full amount next month
tamara.detail: Available for orders up to $3,000. Pay ${{amount}} every month for 3 months.

paymob.label: Secure Checkout
paymob.description: Your payment info is encrypted and secure. We never store your card details.

payment.secureNote: Your payment information is encrypted and secure. We never store your card details.

confirmed.title: Order Placed!
confirmed.description: Thank you for your order. We'll send you a confirmation email shortly.
